title: Task outcome: RAG verification subagent 08: evaluation and behavior proof. Read official RAGAS and LangSmith e
summary: Read official Ragas, LangSmith, Hugging Face MTEB, and Sentence Transformers/SBERT evaluation documentation for RAG evaluation and behavior proof. Produced verified claims for DinoBrain memory-on vs memory-off and retrieval-quality evaluation design. No source files were edited.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Read official Ragas, LangSmith, Hugging Face MTEB, and Sentence Transformers/SBERT evaluation documentation for RAG evaluation and behavior proof. Produced verified claims for DinoBrain memory-on vs memory-off and retrieval-quality evaluation design. No source files were edited.
request: RAG verification subagent 08: evaluation and behavior proof. Read official RAGAS and LangSmith evaluation docs, optionally MTEB/SBERT STS sources, and return verified claims for DinoBrain evaluation design without editing files.
decisions: DinoBrain evaluation should separate retrieval-component quality from end-to-end behavior proof.
Memory-on vs memory-off should be tested as paired experiments over the same prompts, model, evaluator, and dataset.
Embedding benchmarks such as MTEB and STS should be used as context, not as substitutes for DinoBrain-specific retrieval and behavior evaluation.
next_steps: If implementation follows, encode a small frozen regression set with expected memory paths, relevant record IDs, and memory-on/off acceptance thresholds.
Add hard-negative retrieval cases and source-provenance checks before trusting semantic similarity scores.

evidence.snippet: Read official Ragas, LangSmith, Hugging Face MTEB, and Sentence Transformers/SBERT evaluation documentation for RAG evaluation and behavior proof. Produced verified claims for DinoBrain memory-on vs memory-off and retrieval-quality evaluation design. No source files were edited.
